data.body: Implement Gemini on top of the shared interactive session protocol instead of routing it through fallback Claude assumptions. Choose a stable Gemini interactive/session entrypoint, define how prompts and follow-up turns are delivered, normalize Gemini session events into the shared event model, and enforce shared completion, close-input, process-exit, inactivity-timeout, retry, and abort semantics. If Gemini requires a thin launcher or adapter to expose machine-readable session events, scope that work here.
data.title: Add interactive Gemini session support
